headline: Meta AI agents incubation engineer and former Nanome CTO/co-founder building agentic development systems.
title: AI Agents Incubation EM
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, GitHub, and AI Tinkerers sources consistently connect Sam Hesson to Meta AI agents incubation and prior Nanome CTO/co-founder work. Exact EM wording comes from the participant row.
bioMarkdown: Sam works on AI agents incubation at Meta and previously co-founded Nanome, where he led technology for immersive molecular design tools. Strong match for conversations about agentic coding systems, AI development workflows, XR for science, and moving AI-heavy prototypes into production engineering loops.

primary.note: Professional profile preview identifies him with AI Agents Incubation at Meta and prior Nanome CTO/co-founder experience.
